chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دُخُولِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَ زِيَارَةِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ قَبْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 216 – Entering Al-Medina and Ziyarah of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, and the supplication at his<sup>saww</sup> grave

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/263)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/263)
text: أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَهُمْ مُرُّوا بِالْمَدِينَةِ فَسَلِّمُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنْ قَرِيبٍ وَ إِنْ كَانَتِ الصَّلَاةُ تَبْلُغُهُ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Is’haq Bin Ammar that,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is for them to pass by Al-Medina, so they would greet upon Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> from nearby, even though the Blessings do reach him<sup>saww</sup> from afar’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said to them (Hammad and Ishaq), ‘You should pass by al- Madinah and offer al-Salam to the Messenger of Allah from nearby, although it reaches him from faraway places also.’”
